query:
UPDATE schedule_blocks 
SET title = 'Ali — Therapy Session (Online)',
    description = 'Online session with Ali, Reagan''s therapist. 12:00 PM – 12:45 PM.',
    block_type = 'appointment'
WHERE title LIKE '%Vet%' OR title LIKE '%vet%' OR title LIKE '%API vet%'
  AND start_time = '12:00';
